app.title: Lovejoin
app.tagline: Sigmajoin privacy mixer on Cardano. Hyperstructure.
app.vertical_slice_banner: Pre-alpha — Preprod only. Wallet-anonymous Mix collateral lands in M5.
app.preprod_banner: Pre-alpha — Preprod only. Do not use real funds.

home.title: Welcome
home.explainer: Lovejoin is a Cardano-native privacy mixer. Funds enter the pool as a fixed-denomination mix-box; subsequent re-randomisation hides which deposit corresponds to which withdrawal.
home.bullet_deposit: Deposit into the pool to anonymise a fixed-denom amount.
home.bullet_mix: Mix any time — anyone can mix, even without depositing.
home.bullet_withdraw: Withdraw to a different address to break the link.
home.privacy_note: Linkage probability after k mixes at width N is (1/N)^k.
home.connect_prompt: Connect a CIP-30 wallet (Lace, Eternl, Nami) above to begin.
home.connected_prompt: Wallet connected. Choose where to start:

config.blockfrost_help: Free key at blockfrost.io. Required for chain queries + tx submission.
config.backend_url_help: Self-hosted indexer URL. Leave empty to query Blockfrost directly.
config.collateral_endpoint_help: Defaults to giveme.my. Override only if running your own provider.
config.missing_addresses: addresses.{{network}}.json missing under ui/public/. Copy from artifacts/{{network}}/.

wallet.no_wallets: No CIP-30 wallets detected. Install Lace, Eternl, or Nami.

pool.mix_disabled_collateral: Collateral provider unreachable — Mix is disabled.
pool.mix_disabled_pool: Pool too small ({{have}} of {{need}} boxes loaded).
pool.connect_to_mix: Connect a wallet to submit a Mix tx.

pool_status.title: Network status
pool_status.no_backend: No backend configured. Pool size + indexer lag unavailable; Mix submission still works via direct chain queries.

deposit.rounds_help: Higher rounds = more privacy. Funds the fee shard for future mixes.
deposit.preconditions_missing: Configure a Blockfrost key, load addresses, and connect a wallet to deposit.
deposit.see_vault: Box stored — see it in the Vault.

boxes.empty: Nothing yet. Successful deposits will land here.
boxes.empty_hint: Persistence across reloads is M6 — for now keep this tab open until you withdraw.

mix.session_only_hint: Pick boxes from this session and mix them. Pool-wide selection lands in M6.
mix.need_more_boxes: Mix needs at least 2 deposited boxes. Run two deposits first.
mix.fee_payer_shard_hint: Pulls from the shared fee_contract pool. Subject to the on-chain max_fee_per_mix cap.
mix.fee_payer_wallet_hint: Submitter pays the fee directly. No on-chain cap, but the wallet identity is on the tx.

withdraw.select_a_box: Select a deposited box from the list, or paste below.
withdraw.seedelf_detected: Stealth address detected — wallet identity will be hidden after withdraw.
withdraw.seedelf_hint: This is a key address — your wallet identity is visible at the destination. Use a Seedelf address for stealth.
withdraw.preconditions_missing: Configure a Blockfrost key, load addresses, and connect a wallet to withdraw.

collateral_provider.banner_down: The collateral provider is unreachable. Mix submission is disabled until it recovers.

vault.title: Vault
vault.empty: Vault is empty. Deposit a box or import one from a backup JSON to populate it.
vault.import_explainer: Paste the JSON exported from a SecretCard. The vault encrypts it under your passphrase.
vault.import_invalid: JSON missing one of: txId, outputIndex, ownerSecretHex, aHex, bHex
vault.unlock_explainer: Box owner secrets are encrypted under your passphrase. The first time you unlock, the vault is created with a fresh salt.
vault.unlock_to_view: Unlock the vault above to see your stored boxes.
vault.forgot_explainer: There is no recovery path. Resetting the vault wipes every stored secret — funds remain on chain but you must hold the secret separately to withdraw.
vault.reset_confirm_explainer: This permanently deletes every encrypted secret in this browser. Are you sure?

secret_card.title: Save this secret now
secret_card.warning: Without this secret no one — including you — can withdraw the box. The vault has stored an encrypted copy under your passphrase; copy or download a backup as a second-line defence.
secret_card.label: Label

box.title: Box detail
box.linkage_explainer: Each Mix tx re-randomises the box; after k mixes at width N the linkage probability is (1/N)^k.
box.not_found: No box found at that ref. It may have been withdrawn, mixed away, or never imported.
box.preconditions_missing: Configure a Blockfrost key, load addresses, and connect a wallet to withdraw this box.
